entities.name: GROUNDNUT ICGS 35
entities.description: A groundnut variety selected from a natural hybrid population of Robut 33-1, released as Jinpungtangkong in the Korea Republic.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT ROBUT 33-1
entities.description: An Indian groundnut cultivar used as a parent for the selection of ICGS 35.

entities.name: KOREA REPUBLIC
entities.description: The country where ICGS 35 was released and tested.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT JINPUNGTANGKONG
entities.description: The name under which ICGS 35 was released in the Korea Republic.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location where trials for ICGS 35 were conducted from 1980-83.

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The measure of groundnut productivity, expressed in tonnes per hectare.

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which pod yields were measured.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which pod yields were measured.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of the crop reaching maturity quickly.

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of oil present in the groundnut seeds.
